title: Owner-enforced commands accept wildcard channel senders as command owner
description: In resolveCommandAuthorization() in src/auto-reply/command-auth.ts, when a plugin sets commands.enforceOwnerForCommands and no explicit commands.ownerAllowFrom is configured (ownerAllowlistConfigured is false and ownerAllowAll is false), isOwnerForCommands falls back to 'ownerState.allowAll || ownerState.ownerCandidatesForCommands.length === 0 || Boolean(matchedCommandOwner)'. ownerState.allowAll reflects the channel's inbound wildcard allowFrom: ["*"], so on a wildcard-inbound channel this branch evaluates to true for any sender, letting a non-owner pass the owner-command gate for privileged commands such as /send, /config, and /debug.
